name: Gastrointestinal Biome Mini Dry Dog Food with Chicken Bag
description: Your dog's digestive health can be negatively affected by many things and when your dog has digestive upset, it's a thoroughly unpleasant experience for everyone involved. The good news is that you can help your dog feel better with a food that revolutionises the way to approach fibre-responsive GI issues by putting microbiome health – the unique gut ecosystem of your pet - at the forefront of GI care.
